chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D-5257, 5258, 5260, 5261, 5263, 5264, 5265, 5302, 5303, 5304, 5337, 5338, 5339, 5765 & 5823 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 20.01.2025 M/s.Khalid Jawed Khan, Mr.Muhammad Asad Ashfaq & Mir Moula Bux Tunio, Advocates for the Petitioners. M/s..Ahsan Ali Shah, Ameer Nauserwan Adil & Ghazi Khan Khalil, Advocates for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) has submitted a statement, which is taken on record. It is jointly stated that in view of the foregoing these petitions have served their purpose, therefore, may be disposed. Order accordingly. Let copy of this order be placed in all connected petitions. Judge Judge nasir`
